MULTIPLE LARGE TREES DOWN AROUND LAKE ANTOINE AND IN LAKE ANTOINE PARK AND CAMPGROUNDS. RESCUERS ARE CHECKING FOR ANY INJURIES. TREES ALSO DOWN ON PINE MOUNTAIN AND BASS LAKE ROADS. REPORT FROM SOCIAL MEDIA AND TIME IS ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
